prompt.content:
The merger scenario with RMBS and ONTO in the model is updated with the following assumptions:
- 50% cash consideration
- 0% bid premium
- 90% SG&A synergies
- ONTO share price is the closing share price on 1/2/26

Output the total pro forma combined equity value in thousands to the nearest whole number.

rubrics.name: States total pro forma combined equity value is $17,803,036 thousand... (ver_518133cc2a144c05855e977ec5f3d33e)

messages.content: States total pro forma combined equity value is $17,803,036 thousand (acceptable range $17,625,006 to $17,981,066).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Total pro forma combined equity value is $17,803,036 thousand
